title: Conditional Branch
description: Evaluate a binary condition, execute the appropriate branch, then produce a final answer.
when_to_use: A later action depends on the result of an earlier node.
The condition can be phrased as a binary yes/no question.
skeleton: tool/summary/result: gather context needed for the decision
decision: ask one binary condition with yes/no branches
branch nodes: perform only the work needed for each branch
result: answer using the executed branch output
adaptation_notes: Branches must be exactly yes and no; choose a default_branch that is safe if the decision call fails.
Do not use a decision node for simple sequencing where no branch is needed.
